final:
module shift_register (
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [7:0] parallel_in,
    output reg [7:0] q);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (load) begin
            q <= parallel_in;
        end else begin
            q <= {q[6:0], 1'b0};
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (load) begin
        q <= {parallel_in[6:0], 1'b0};
      end else begin
        q <= {q[6:0], 1'b1};
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
